name: Mom20+WILR14+Top5 w60
description: A hybrid trend-momentum rotator that scores three signals on QQQ — a 200-day price-median trend gate, a short-term price momentum check, and a Williams %R reading — to assign one of three risk levels. When all signals align, it holds leveraged tech; partial agreement shifts into the top large-cap stocks; full disagreement mixes stocks and cash.
overfit_notes: Uses two standard components (price-median trend gate and WILR) plus a rate-of-change momentum check. The WILR threshold at -50 (midline) and the 200-day median-price regime filter are slightly unconventional. The mid-state blends (60/40 TQQQ/TopN) and BIL half-allocation at n=0 are tuned parameters.

rules.label: Trend gate
rules.text: QQQ price > median of last 200 daily closes

rules.label: Strength filter
rules.text: Williams %R(14) on QQQ > -50

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: Score 3 (all signals bullish) → 100% TQQQ; Score 2 → 60% TQQQ + 40% Top-5 large-caps equally; Score 1 → 100% Top-5 large-caps; Score 0 → 50% Top-5 + 50% BIL

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal: QQQ + Williams %R. Execution: TQQQ / top-5 market-cap stocks from top-100 by dollar volume / BIL

rules.label: Universe
rules.text: Coarse: top 100 by dollar volume; Fine: top 5 by market cap

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open, on state change only

name: Mom20+ADX14+Top5 w70
description: A hybrid trend-momentum rotator using three QQQ signals — a 200-day price-median trend gate, a 20-day price momentum check, and ADX directional-index comparison — to select one of three risk levels. Full bullish agreement goes to leveraged tech; mixed signals rotate into large-cap stocks or a blend; all bearish moves to half cash.
overfit_notes: Two standard components (ADX and price-median trend). ADX criterion uses DI+ > DI- (directional cross, not a threshold level) which is a standard but mid-sensitivity signal. Mid-state weight at 70/30 (TQQQ/TopN) is more tuned than the w60 variant.

rules.label: Trend gate
rules.text: QQQ price > median of last 200 daily closes

rules.label: Strength filter
rules.text: ADX(14) positive directional index > negative directional index on QQQ

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: Score 3 → 100% TQQQ; Score 2 → 70% TQQQ + 30% Top-5 large-caps equally; Score 1 → 100% Top-5 large-caps; Score 0 → 50% Top-5 + 50% BIL

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal: QQQ + ADX. Execution: TQQQ / top-5 market-cap stocks from top-100 by dollar volume / BIL

rules.label: Universe
rules.text: Coarse: top 100 by dollar volume; Fine: top 5 by market cap

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open, on state change only

name: Mom20+CCI20+Top5 w60
description: A hybrid trend-momentum rotator scoring three QQQ signals — a 200-day price-median trend gate, a 20-day price momentum check, and a CCI midline cross — to select one of four risk levels. Full agreement goes to leveraged tech; partial agreement blends tech ETF with top large-cap stocks; no agreement holds half in cash.
overfit_notes: Uses two standard components (price-median trend and CCI) plus a momentum lookback. CCI threshold at zero (midline) is canonical. The 60/40 TQQQ/TopN mid-state blend and BIL half-split at score 0 are tuned parameters.

rules.label: Trend gate
rules.text: QQQ price > median of last 200 daily closes

rules.label: Strength filter
rules.text: CCI(20, Simple) on QQQ > 0

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: Score 3 → 100% TQQQ; Score 2 → 60% TQQQ + 40% Top-5 large-caps equally; Score 1 → 100% Top-5 large-caps; Score 0 → 50% Top-5 + 50% BIL

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal: QQQ + CCI. Execution: TQQQ / top-5 market-cap stocks from top-100 by dollar volume / BIL

rules.label: Universe
rules.text: Coarse: top 100 by dollar volume; Fine: top 5 by market cap

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open, on state change only

name: Mom30+MFI14+Top5 w60
description: A hybrid trend-momentum rotator using three QQQ signals — a 200-day price-median trend gate, a 30-day price momentum check, and Money Flow Index above its midline — to select one of four risk levels. Strong agreement goes to leveraged tech; mixed signals rotate into large-cap stocks or blends; all bearish shifts fully to stocks and cash.
overfit_notes: Two standard components (price-median trend and MFI) plus a momentum lookback. MFI threshold at 50 is the canonical midline. The 60/40 TQQQ/TopN mid-state split and 30-day momentum window are slightly tuned.

rules.label: Strength filter
rules.text: MFI(14) on QQQ > 50

rules.label: Universe
rules.text: Coarse: top 100 by dollar volume; Fine: top 5 by market cap

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open, on state change only

name: Mom60+MFI14+Top5 w60
description: A hybrid trend-momentum rotator using three QQQ signals — a 200-day price-median trend gate, a 60-day price momentum check, and Money Flow Index above its midline — to select one of four risk levels. Full bullish agreement goes to leveraged tech; mixed conditions blend leveraged tech with large-cap stocks; bearish conditions rotate into stocks and cash.
overfit_notes: Same structure as strategy 404 with a longer 60-day momentum window instead of 30-day. MFI midline at 50 is canonical; 60/40 blending and the specific momentum period are tuned.

name: 4S Mom20+MFI14+Top3+BIL
description: A four-state hybrid rotator that scores three signals on QQQ — a 200-day price-median trend gate, a 20-day price momentum check, and Money Flow Index above its midline — to allocate between leveraged tech, large-cap stocks, and cash. The four states step down from full TQQQ when all signals agree to full cash when all disagree, with two intermediate blends.
overfit_notes: Uses two standard components (price-median trend gate and MFI(14)) plus a 20-day momentum lookback. The four-state allocation ladder (100% TQQQ / 60-40 / 50-50 BIL split / 100% BIL) involves multiple tuned weight breakpoints. Top-3 holding count is a selected parameter.

rules.label: Trend gate
rules.text: QQQ price > median of last 200 daily closes

rules.label: Strength filter
rules.text: MFI(14) > 50 on QQQ → bullish threshold

rules.label: Entry

rules.text: Signal: QQQ + MFI(14). Execution: TQQQ / top-3 market-cap stocks from top-100 by dollar volume / BIL

rules.label: Universe
rules.text: Coarse: top 100 by dollar volume; Fine: top 3 by market cap

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open, on state change only

description: A four-state hybrid rotator that scores three signals on QQQ — a 200-day price-median trend gate, a 20-day price momentum check, and Williams %R above the midline — to allocate between leveraged tech, large-cap stocks, and cash. The four states step down from full TQQQ when all signals agree to full cash when all disagree, with two intermediate blends.
overfit_notes: Uses two standard components (price-median trend gate and Williams %R(14)) plus a 20-day momentum lookback. The four-state allocation ladder (100% TQQQ / 60-40 / 50-50 BIL split / 100% BIL) involves multiple tuned weight breakpoints. Top-5 holding count is a selected parameter.

rules.label: Trend gate
rules.text: QQQ price > median of last 200 daily closes

rules.label: Strength filter
rules.text: Williams %R(14) > -50 on QQQ → bullish threshold

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: Score 3 → 100% TQQQ; Score 2 → 60% TQQQ + 40% Top-5 large-caps equally; Score 1 → 50% Top-5 large-caps + 50% BIL; Score 0 → 100% BIL

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal: QQQ + Williams %R(14). Execution: TQQQ / top-5 market-cap stocks from top-100 by dollar volume / BIL

rules.label: Universe
rules.text: Coarse: top 100 by dollar volume; Fine: top 5 by market cap

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open, on state change only

name: 4S Mom20+ADX14+Top5+BIL
description: A four-state hybrid rotator that scores three signals on QQQ — a 200-day price-median trend gate, a 20-day price momentum check, and ADX directional index showing positive trend (DI+ > DI-) — to allocate between leveraged tech, large-cap stocks, and cash. The four states step down from full TQQQ when all signals agree to full cash when all disagree, with two intermediate blends.
overfit_notes: Uses two standard components (price-median trend gate and ADX(14)) plus a 20-day momentum lookback. The four-state allocation ladder (100% TQQQ / 60-40 / 50-50 BIL split / 100% BIL) involves multiple tuned weight breakpoints. Top-5 holding count is a selected parameter.

rules.label: Trend gate
rules.text: QQQ price > median of last 200 daily closes

rules.label: Strength filter
rules.text: ADX(14) DI+ > DI- on QQQ → bullish threshold

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: Score 3 → 100% TQQQ; Score 2 → 60% TQQQ + 40% Top-5 large-caps equally; Score 1 → 50% Top-5 large-caps + 50% BIL; Score 0 → 100% BIL

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal: QQQ + ADX(14). Execution: TQQQ / top-5 market-cap stocks from top-100 by dollar volume / BIL

rules.label: Universe
rules.text: Coarse: top 100 by dollar volume; Fine: top 5 by market cap

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open, on state change only

name: Mom20+Sto10+Top3
description: A hybrid trend-momentum rotator that scores three signals on QQQ — a 200-day price-median trend gate, a 20-day price momentum check, and Stochastic %K above its midline — to place capital across four risk levels. Full bullish agreement goes to leveraged tech; partial agreement mixes leveraged tech with large-cap stocks or holds stocks alone; full bearish splits between stocks and cash.
overfit_notes: Uses two standard components (price-median trend gate and Stochastic oscillator) plus a 20-day momentum lookback. The Stochastic period of 10 bars is a selected parameter; the %K > 50 midline threshold is canonical. The four-state allocation ladder (100% / 50-50 TQQQ+TopN / 100% TopN / 50-50 TopN+BIL) involves multiple tuned breakpoints.

rules.label: Trend gate
rules.text: QQQ price > median of last 200 daily closes

rules.label: Strength filter
rules.text: Stochastic %K(10,3,3) on QQQ > 50

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: Score 3 → 100% TQQQ; Score 2 → 50% TQQQ + 50% Top-3 large-caps equally; Score 1 → 100% Top-3 large-caps; Score 0 → 50% Top-3 large-caps + 50% BIL

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal: QQQ + Stochastic. Execution: TQQQ / top-3 market-cap stocks from top-100 by dollar volume / BIL

rules.label: Universe
rules.text: Coarse: top 100 by dollar volume; Fine: top 3 by market cap

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open, on state change only
